name: diff-view
title: Diff View
description: Color-coded unified diff renderer. Additions green, removals red, hunk headers highlighted, line numbers on both sides. Includes a ParseUnified helper for diff -u output.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Pass WithLines(ParseUnified(diff)) to render `git diff -u` output. To render a diff you generated yourself, construct []Line directly. Up/Down scrolls one line, PgUp/PgDn scrolls a window, Home/End jumps. Lines longer than the body width truncate with an ellipsis.
